data.title: China's Market Rebound: Is The NPC Meeting A Turning Point For Investors?
data.description: China's NPC meeting has sparked optimism in the market, with Chinese stocks and bonds rallying. Investors are hopeful for growth targets but remain skeptical.

Trump's Crypto Venture Earns $350 Million Within 18 Days Of Memecoin Launch: 'It's A Terrible Example,' Says Expert
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump’s cryptocurrency project has reportedly amassed a whopping $350 million from the sale of his memecoin.

data.title: SaaS Company LiveRamp Lays Off 5% Of Full-Time Workforce Amid Strategic Restructuring
data.description: LiveRamp announces a workforce restructuring impacting 65 employees. The restructuring aims to enhance operational efficiency and profitability. The company expects a $6.5 million restructuring charge, primarily for severance and benefits, with most of it incurred in Q4 FY 2025.
